title: Security
description: The User’s chat history can only be accessible through his account and will not be visible to other users

title: Usability
description: The system interface should be designed for seamless user interaction

title: Design Constraints
description: The system should be designed to handle connection interruption and data loss

title: Performance
description: The system should be able to process user input and provide job recommendations in a timely manner

title: Scalability
description: The system should be able to handle a large number of users and job listings
